TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tjusinlung i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjusinlung. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjusinlung sa, 89 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 264 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 259 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 92%, Bunun 2%, Amis 2%, Tayal 1%, zumazuma 2%.
S.PHON: tjusinr~ɾuŋ i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjusinr~ɾuŋ. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjusinr~ɾuŋ sa, ** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, amis *%, tajar~ɾ *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Tjusinlung i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjusinlung. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjusinlung sa, 89 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 264 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 259 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 92%, Bunun 2%, Amis 2%, Tayal 1%, zumazuma 2%.
S.PHON: tjusinr~ɾuŋ i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjusinr~ɾuŋ. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjusinr~ɾuŋ sa, ** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, amis *%, tajar~ɾ *%, zumazuma *%.
